subcodes.first_line: O thou who art associated with the Luminous Orb of the horizons! The revered Uncle gazeth upon thee from the Kingdom of mysteries, for thou art his remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منسوب نیر آفاق حضرت عم بزرگوار از ملکوت اسرار نظر بشما دارد زیرا یادگار
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
